items.title: Trump pulls security clearances for Harris, Clinton | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>'I have determined that it is no longer in the national interest for the following individuals to access classified information," Trump said in a memorandum after revoking security clearances for Kamala Harris, Hillary Clinton and others.

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Israeli artillery and airstrikes hit south Lebanon after Israel said it intercepted rockets fired from across the border, endangering a shaky truce that ended a year-long war between Israel and Lebanese-armed group Hezbollah.

items.title: Trump and the judges: a constitutional test
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Deportations by the Trump administration are testing the system set up by America's founders where three equal branches of government check each other’s power.  Our legal journalists examine the growing standoff between the executive and judicial branches to understand where we go from here.






Donald Trump and John Roberts: Two sides of a US judiciary under pressure (https://www.reuters.com/world/us/donald-trump-john-roberts-two-sides-us-judiciary-under-pressure-2025-03-22/) 






Sign up for the Reuters Econ World newsletter here (https://www.reuters.com/newsletters/reuters-econ-world/) . 


Listen to the Reuters Econ World podcast here (https://nam02.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Flink.chtbl.com%2FAbxd8GDx&data=05%7C02%7CGayle.Issa%40thomsonreuters.com%7C61fba21571bc4521d54008dd62cc9fb1%7C62ccb8646a1a4b5d8e1c397dec1a8258%7C0%7C0%7C638775353175569335%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=OK3JQtm1p1ckSHrS0tg6WKa4wB4%2FW9KfiW1CgGSJj%2F0%3D&reserved=0) .

items.title: As Russia retakes Kursk, Ukrainians ask: 'Was it worth it?' | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Ukraine's retreat from the Kursk city of Sudzha, recently confirmed by Kyiv, has deepened the public divide on the incursion's benefits. Many people do not see any logic in the operation.
